markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on blog visuals, tracking, and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Blog visuals are repetitive;** Monograph will define a new brand identity, which growthx.ai will then implement.](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)
  - [**New tracking will isolate growthx.ai's impact** by tagging conversions from unique CTAs in their articles.](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [**Content strategy will shift to support new product launches** (AI, CRM), with Monograph defining the new topic mix.](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [**Early wins are visible:** 12 demo submissions were sourced from ChatGPT last month, and growthx.ai will build a native dashboard to track LLM exposure.](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)

## Topics

### Blog Visuals & Brand Identity

  - [**Problem:** Current blog visuals are repetitive and fail to stand out.](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** Monograph lacks a defined brand identity and messaging framework.](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Solution:** Monograph will lead an internal brand pass to establish a new visual language.](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [**Implementation:** growthx.ai will then apply these new guidelines to all future content.](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [**Interim Plan:** growthx.ai will continue the current text-overlay style. Monograph's creative lead (Chris) will build a Figma template for unique newsletter assets.](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)

### Conversion Tracking & Reporting

  - [**Goal:** Isolate conversions driven by growthx.ai content from general site activity.](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [**Method:**](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
    1.  [Monograph's Ops team creates a unique GTM conversion tag for growthx.ai content.](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
    2.  [growthx.ai updates the CTA link in each article with a UTM parameter that triggers this tag.](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**Action:** Allison will request this setup from Ops tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
  - [**Reddit Tracking:** Looker cannot track Reddit data. growthx.ai is developing a native dashboard to provide performance metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)

### Content Strategy & New Products

  - [**New Products:** Monograph is launching "Leads" (tentative name) and an AI feature.](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
  - [**Keyword Signals:** The new product uses a Kanban UI, suggesting "Kanban" as a potential keyword.](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
  - [**Content Mix:** Monograph will define a new monthly content mix (e.g., % for AI, CRM, Engineering) to support these launches.](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [**Options:**](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
      - [**Reallocate:** Shift the current 20-article/month budget to focus exclusively on new product topics.](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
      - [**Expand:** Add new articles to the contract specifically for the new products.](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)

### Performance & Case Study

  - [**ChatGPT Referrals:** 12 demo submissions last month were sourced from ChatGPT, validating growthx.ai's LLM strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)
  - [**LLM Trend:** growthx.ai noted a recent surge in traffic from Anthropic's Claude, a trend Monograph should monitor.](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
  - [**Case Study:** growthx.ai requested a 30-min interview with Monograph for a case study.](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
      - [**Recommended SMEs:** Robert or Chris, who have worked with growthx.ai since the start.](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Allison:**](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
      - [Request GTM/GA access for growthx.ai from Ops (Nov 6).](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
      - [Request the unique GTM conversion tag from Ops (Nov 6).](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
      - [Define the new monthly content mix (AI, CRM, Engineering).](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
      - [Request a blog creative template from Chris.](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [**Jessica:**](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
      - [Discuss brand identity and messaging frameworks internally.](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [**growthx.ai:**](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
      - [Update article CTA links with the new UTM parameter once the tag is live.](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [Confirm Robert or Chris's availability for the case study interview.](https://fathom.video/share/9roP-xvps46iLhsiTD2BGPsVHsSGuug4?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
